children.text: direct costs the Secretary incurs to flight check, operate, and maintain air navigation facilities referred to in safely and efficiently; andsection 44502(a)(1)(A) of this title
the costs of services provided under international agreements related to the joint financing of air navigation services assessed against the United States Government.
